channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer 2026 Meal Plans
item.description: Purchase your Summer 2026 Meal Plan today to enjoy all you care to eat dining at Commons Dining Hall and Flex Dollars to use at Panera and Fathers this summer. For more information on available plans and how to order please click the link above.
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer 2026 TA Office Hours
item.description: Wednesdays : 3-8pm (Ballroom, Student Union) Need some support with your summer classes? Drop by your TA’s office hours in the Student Union for extra help, then recharge with fun mental floss activities from the Center of Gravity!
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer II 2026 End of Term Course Surveys in HelioCampus: Adding Additional Questions to a Course Section (Faculty/Instructor Training)
item.description: Date: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 11:30 AM - 12:00 PM - This webinar offers faculty/instructors of course sections to add additional questions to their student end of term course evaluations. This is an optional process and only needed if instructors wanted to add other questions than what is on the institute course evaluation. Please click the link in the See section to register for the session.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Join HR Virtual Office Hours - RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations
item.description: Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Fidelity Confidential Consultation (By Phone with Zoom Video Option)
item.description:
Date: Thursday, June 4, 2026 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM - Schedule a confidential consultation to help you become better informed and more confident about your workplace retirement savings plan benefits. To schedule an appointment, call 1-800-642-7131, Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to midnight, or online at https://nb.fidelity.com/public/nbpreloginnav/rpi/microsite/#/tem/meet-with-us

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
